articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Former Hawaii Gov. George Ariyoshi, first U.S. governor of Asian American descent, dies at 100 - NBC News
articles.description: Former Hawaii Gov. George R. Ariyoshi, the nation's first Asian American governor, has died at 100 years old.
articles.content:
HONOLULU Former Hawaii Gov. George R. Ariyoshi the nation's first Asian American governor has died at 100 years old.
